evals.prompt: Tailor my resume for this job: https://jobs.example.com/senior-python-django. The role requires Django, PostgreSQL, AWS, and REST API experience.
evals.expected_output: Should read all JSON files, rate JD relevance, confirm with user before making changes, preserve real metrics/achievements, reorder bullet points to emphasize Django/AWS, use stop-slop/humanizer if available

evals.prompt: Update my resume for a React full-stack position. The JD emphasizes React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js.
evals.expected_output: Should rate JD relevance, check existing experience for React/TypeScript, reorder projects to emphasize frontend, preserve real project names, ask user confirmation before changes

evals.prompt: Can you check if my resume matches this AWS DevOps role? JD: https://jobs.example.com/devops-engineer
evals.expected_output: Should read experience.json and projects.json, rate JD relevance (5-8?), map AWS/DevOps keywords to existing data, provide gap analysis, NOT make changes without user request

evals.prompt: I got recruiter feedback saying my resume lacks Kubernetes. Add Kubernetes to my experience.
evals.expected_output: Should first check if Kubernetes exists in any project/tech stack in repo, if not found ask user if they have actual K8s experience, if user confirms add with context. MUST NOT fabricate.
